name: Planked Red Snapper
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the red snapper fillets with salt and pepper, lemon juice, and a dash of paprika.
2. Rub each fillet with olive oil.
3. Place the seasoned fish on the plank board.
4. Arrange desired vegetables (onion rings, peas, mushroom caps, asparagus, etc.) around the fish.
5. Broil the assembled planked fish for 10 minutes.
6. Serve sizzling hot.
Also suitable for: Cobia, trout, King mackerel, Spanish mackerel, Dolphin, Grouper, Amberjack, mullet.
